examples: The car headed directly toward Chengdu.
In Chengdu, tea culture has developed into the Chengdu-featured tea house culture.

People reported feeling tremors in the provincial capital of Chengdu, 70 miles to the northeast.
Similarly, Intel moved its manufacturing and testing plants from Shanghai to Chengdu in 2009.
